title: Simpleriding
description: A simple riding mod. Allows some riding  upgrades for faster travel. (Happyghasts, horses and other saddled mobs)
body:
# 🐎 SimpleRiding
**(Mod ID: `simpleriding`)**

![Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a05de13a86d5014ef1c7c4298c4e4eaf1f248d5c.png)


**SimpleRiding** bridges the gap between Elytra flight and traditional travel. Forget slow horses—enhance your mounts with custom enchantments like **Tailwind** and **Leaping**. Travel the world in style, not just through the air.

**[📚 Read the Full Documentation](https://github.com/Ouzzi/simpleriding)**

---

## ✨ Features

* **💨 Speed Demon:** Apply **Tailwind** to any Saddle to drastically increase speed (works on Horses, Pigs, Striders, Camels, and even Ghasts).
* **🦘 Sky High:** Use **Leaping** on Horse Armor to boost jump height and clear obstacles easily.
* **🛡️ Better Armor:** Horse Armor now accepts standard boot enchantments like **Feather Falling**, **Frost Walker**, and **Protection**.
* **🌍 Exploration Loot:** Find these rare enchantments in Bastions, Nether Fortresses, and Trial Chambers.
* **⚖️ Balanced Economy:** Master Librarians and Wandering Traders sell these exclusive books.

---

## 🛠️ Enchantments
Upgrade your mount with rare books and an Anvil.

### 🍃 Tailwind (I - III)
* **Target:** Saddles
* **Effect:** Increases movement speed of the ridden entity.
* **Scaling:** +30% speed per level (Configurable).

### 🐇 Leaping (I - III)
* **Target:** Horse Armor
* **Effect:** Increases jump strength.
* **Scaling:** +20% jump height per level (Configurable).

### 🥾 Utility
* **Target:** Horse Armor
* **Effect:** Apply standard boot enchantments.
* **Allowed:** `Feather Falling`, `Protection`, `Depth Strider`, `Frost Walker`, `Soul Speed`.

---

## ⚙️ Configuration
Adjust settings in-game using **Cloth Config** (requires Mod Menu).

* **World Gen:** Toggle Villager trades and Loot Chest generation.
* **Balancing:** Configure speed multipliers and jump strength bonuses.

---

## 📥 Dependencies

1.  **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** (Required)
2.  **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** (Required)
3.  **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)** (Optional)

---
